data.description: Nykredit Realkredit A/S adjusts coupon rates.

data.title: Hundreds of New York students will showcase their love for schools at New York Academy of Medicine on Jan. 29.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in New York, hundreds of students will unite at the New York Academy of Medicine to express their admiration for their schools. The event will feature various activities, including speeches, dance routines, and other student presentations.

data.title: Investors concerned as software stocks underperform in 2026 due to AI competition from companies like OpenAI, Anthropic.
data.description: In 2026, software stocks are once again showing weak performance as investors are concerned about potential competition from artificial intelligence firms such as OpenAI and Anthropic. There is a debate among investors about whether these worries are justified or exaggerated.

data.title: MySavant.ai launches AI-powered nearshore workforce model in Jan 2026 for logistics with focus on operational performance.
data.description: A new company based in Coral Springs, Florida, called MySavant.ai, has recently been launched on January 15, 2026. The company introduced an innovative nearshore workforce model driven by artificial intelligence. This model aims to assist logistics and supply chain companies in expanding their operations with increased efficiency, visibility, and control. MySavant.ai was founded by an undisclosed individual.

data.title: Boston Scientific to acquire Penumbra for $14.5B, at $374 per share, boosting cardiovascular portfolio. Penumbra stock rises, Boston Scientific dips.
data.description: In a significant move, Boston Scientific has announced its acquisition of Penumbra for a staggering $14.5 billion, valuing each share at $374. This acquisition is set to enhance Boston Scientific's presence in the cardiovascular sector. Following this news, Penumbra's stock experienced a notable surge, whereas Boston Scientific saw a decline in its stock value. This acquisition marks a substantial medtech deal in the industry, showcasing the strategic growth and expansion plans of both companies.

data.title: Jen Easterly appointed as new CEO of RSAC, world's top cybersecurity platform hosting largest conference.
data.description: Today, in San Francisco, RSAC, the leading global cybersecurity platform known for hosting the world's biggest cybersecurity conference, revealed the appointment of Jen Easterly as its Chief Executive Officer. This announcement marks a significant development in the industry.

data.title: JBTC announces 4th quarter 2025 earnings: $2.89M ($1.19 EPS), up 62.82% from Q4 2024. Full-year earnings $10.01M.
data.description: In Jonestown, Pennsylvania, on January 15, 2026, JBT Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: JBTC) released its quarterly financial report, showcasing earnings amounting to $2,890,000 and earnings per share reaching $1.19. This demonstrates a notable upsurge of 62.82% in comparison to the same quarter in 2024. The full-year unaudited earnings summed up to $10,006,000. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Aduro Clean Technologies' Q2 2026 revenue increased by 222% to $122,706 vs Q2 2025. Loss from operations was $6,461,987 for Q2 2026, up from $3,114,712 in Q2 2025. Adjusted EBITDA was $(3,299,026) for Q2 2026 vs $(1,887,750) in Q2 2025. Cash position was $13.04M on Nov 30, 2025, up from $6.96M in Q4 2025 after receiving approx. US$20M from a public offering.
data.description: Aduro Clean Technologies Inc. reported its financial results for the three and six months ended November 30, 2025, showcasing significant growth. Quarterly revenue for Q2 2026 was $122,706, a 222% increase from $38,143 in Q2 2025. Year-to-date revenue for the six months ending November 30, 2025, was $167,206, an 80% increase from $93,143 in the same period in 2024. The company's loss from operations was $6,461,987 for Q2 2026, compared to $3,114,712 for Q2 2025. Adjusted EBITDA was $(3,299,026) for Q2 2026, compared to $(1,887,750) for Q2 2025. As of November 30, 2025, the company had $13.04 million in cash. They also completed a U.S. public offering raising approximately US$20 million post the reporting period, to further strengthen their financial position. The financial report indicated increased expenses driven by various factors contributing to the loss increase. The company has been progressing on its technological advancements and operational growth.

data.title: GSI Technology to reveal Q3 2026 results on Jan 29, 2026 after market close; conference call to follow.
data.description: SUNNYVALE, California - On January 15, 2026, GSI Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: GSIT) will release its financial results for the fiscal third quarter of 2026, concluding on December 31, 2025. This announcement will occur after the market closes on Thursday, January 29, 2026. GSI Technology is renowned for creating the groundbreaking Associative Processing Unit (APU), a game-changer in artificial intelligence and high-performance computing by delivering genuine compute-in-memory technology. Following the financial report, company management will host a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific time (4:30 p.m. Eastern) to discuss the Q3 results and offer insights into the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 300+ students in Indianapolis celebrate school choice and talent at Butler Arts & Events Center on Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: More than 300 students from various parts of Indiana are set to convene at the Butler Arts & Events Center - Schrott Center for the Arts on Thursday, January 29, 2026. Their purpose is clear: to express their appreciation for school choice and affirm their love for their respective educational institutions. The event will serve as a platform for these students to showcase...

data.title: Antech™ Academy in Europe marks 20 years of continuous veterinary education, supporting professionals with high-quality training.
data.description: Antech™, a prominent veterinary diagnostics company based in Leipzig, Germany, has revealed that their educational platform, Antech Academy, is commemorating its 20th anniversary. The platform stands as one of the biggest and most enduring continuous veterinary education resources in Europe. Over the past two decades, Antech Academy has strongly upheld its mission to assist veterinary professionals in enhancing their clinical skills through top-notch, pertinent education. This milestone highlights the platform's enduring dedication to providing valuable support to veterinarians for their professional development.

data.title: Chipotle introduces limited-time menu items for top American athletes including U.S. hockey players and snowboarder; available on app and website today.
data.description: Today, popular U.S. hockey athletes Matthew Tkachuk, Brady Tkachuk, Hilary Knight, and Taylor Heise, alongside snowboarder Red Gerard, will have their favorite dishes showcased on the Chipotle app and website as exclusive menu items. This collaboration with Chipotle showcases limited-time entrees curated by these sports stars. Chipotle has also introduced fresh episodes of its content series, offering customers a unique dining experience.

data.title: ZenaTech set to share its progress in global drone services and defense sector at three investor conferences.
data.description: ZenaTech will offer insights on its expansion of Global Drone as a Service and advancements in the defense sector at three upcoming investor conferences. The company will discuss its strategies for growth and provide updates on key metrics, including revenue and market penetration, highlighting the opportunities within the defense industry. Attendees can expect to learn about ZenaTech's plans for scaling its drone services globally and its focus on innovation to meet the evolving needs of the market.

data.title: Curaleaf opens 71st store in Florida, topping 160 nationwide. Leading cannabis provider.
data.description: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc., a prominent global cannabis provider, has expanded its presence in Florida to a total of 71 locations. This growth reflects the company's broader strategy to bolster its nationwide footprint, which now exceeds 160 stores with the latest opening. The new store in Stamford, Conn. launched on Jan. 15, 2026. Curaleaf's shares trade on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol CURA and on the OTCQX market under the symbol CURLF.

data.title: IHC and U.S. DFC collaborate to mobilize capital in critical sectors like minerals, energy, healthcare, etc.
data.description: IHC and the U.S. International Development Finance Corporation (DFC) have established a strategic partnership to facilitate the mobilization of capital in key sectors including critical minerals, energy, logistics, healthcare, food security, and Information, Communication, and Technology (ICT). This framework will focus on joint origination efforts to promote investment in these sectors.

data.title: Short squeeze affects top 500 cryptos with largest squeeze since October. Bitcoin outperforms USD amid geopolitical uncertainty.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets experienced a significant short squeeze, the biggest one since October. This resulted in the liquidation of short positions as Bitcoin surged in value compared to the US dollar. This sudden spike in Bitcoin's performance occurred against a backdrop of geopolitical uncertainty in the market.
